en: Do you know how to use this English word? Schedule.
ko: 이 영어 단어 어떻게 쓰는지 알아? Schedule

en: Schedule. It's a verb that means to plan when and where events will happen.
ko: Schedule. 이벤트가 언제 어디서 열릴지 계획하다라는 뜻의 동사야

en: Here's an example. Schedule the tasting.
Schedule the tasting. I'll schedule the tasting once we finalize the spice list.
I'll schedule the tasting once we finalize the spice list.
I'll schedule the tasting once we finalize the spice list.
That's cutting it close. Can we avoid chaos?
ko: 빠듯하네. 혼란을 피할 수 있을까? 복습하자

en: Let's review. Say this out loud.
Schedule the tasting. Schedule the tasting.
I'll schedule the tasting once we finalize the spice list.
I'll schedule the tasting once we finalize the spice list.
Great job. Follow English Class 101 for more English lessons.
ko: 팔로우해서 더 많은 영어 수업을 들어봐
